'''Darred Janren Naberrie''', formerly known as '''Darred Janren''' and occasionally as '''Darred Naberrie''', was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Architect/Legends|architect]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. Janren met fellow student [[Sola Naberrie/Legends|Sola Naberrie]] at a [[University/Legends|university]], and the two were [[Marriage/Legends|married]] around [[28 BBY/Legends|28 BBY]], following their graduation. Darred took Naberrie as a surname, as the couple both recognized the value behind the name of [[Naberrie family/Legends|House Naberrie]]. Darred and Sola had two [[Youngling/Legends|children]] together: [[Ryoo Naberrie/Legends|Ryoo]] and [[Pooja Naberrie/Legends|Pooja]].

==Biography==
[[File:SolaNaberrie-SWCTP.png|thumb|right|250px|Darred's wife, Sola Naberrie]]
Darred Janren was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to<ref name="CSWE" /> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Annual">''[[Star Wars Annual 2009]]''</ref> [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]].<ref name="CSWE" /> Janren's maternal grandmother was named [[Pooja]].<ref name="Pooja">{{DB|character|poojanaberrie|Naberrie, Pooja}}</ref> While young<ref name="Sola" /> and studying to be an [[Architect/Legends|architect]] at a<ref name="FF105">{{FactFile|105|NAB 7-8|Sola Naberrie}}</ref> prestigious<ref name="CSWE Sola">{{CSWECite|II|352|Naberrie, Sola}}</ref> Naboo [[University/Legends|university]], Janren met another student, [[Sola Naberrie/Legends|Sola Naberrie]], and the two entered into a relationship.<ref name="FF80">{{FactFile|80|NAB 1-4|Jobal Naberrie}}</ref> Following their graduation, Sola and Darred got [[Marriage/Legends|married]]<ref name="CSWE Sola" /> around [[28 BBY/Legends|28 BBY]],<ref name="Date">{{FactFile|80|NAB 1-4|Jobal Naberrie}} states that Darred Janren and [[Sola Naberrie/Legends|Sola Naberrie]] were [[Marriage/Legends|married]] roughly halfway through [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala's]] reign as [[Monarch of Naboo/Legends|Queen of Naboo]]. ''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' states that Amidala served an eight [[Standard year/Legends|year]] term, which [[Coronation of Queen Amidala/Legends|commenced]] during the events of ''[[Cloak of Deception]]'', placed in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]] by ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''. Therefore, Sola and Janren's wedding must have taken place around [[28 BBY/Legends|28 BBY]].</ref> halfway through the reign of Sola's sister [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] as [[Monarch of Naboo/Legends|Queen of Naboo]].<ref name="FF80" /> The wedding made Janren a part of the influential [[Naberrie family/Legends|House Naberrie]], and the couple agreed to retain the Naberrie surname due to its value in business,<ref name="CSWE Sola" /> [[Politics/Legends|political]], and social contexts within [[Naboo (people)/Legends|Naboo]] culture.<ref name="Sola" /> This choice rendered Darred's full name as Darred Janren Naberrie,<ref name="Annual" /> although he was sometimes referred to as Darred Naberrie.<ref name="Pooja" />

The wedding of Darred and Sola was of significant reassurance to Sola's [[Parent/Legends|mother]], [[Jobal Naberrie/Legends|Jobal]], as it matched the type of life Jobal had desired for her daughters. The relationship also increased Jobal's worries about Amidala in her role as [[Queen/Legends|queen]].<ref name="FF80" /> Shortly after their marriage,<ref name="FF105" /> Sola [[Reproduction/Legends|gave birth]] to the couple's first daughter, [[Ryoo Naberrie/Legends|Ryoo]], in 28 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]], followed by another daughter in [[26 BBY/Legends|26 BBY]],<ref name="FF140">{{FactFile|140|FAM 1-2|Skywalker Family Tree}}</ref> whom they named [[Pooja Naberrie/Legends|Pooja]] after Darred's grandmother.<ref name="Pooja" /> Sola and Darred's family lived in the same district in the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Theed/Legends|Theed]] as Sola's parents, Jobal and [[Ruwee Naberrie/Legends|Ruwee]], allowing the [[Youngling/Legends|children]] to visit their grandparents frequently.<ref name="FF105" /> Through Amidala's [[Wedding of Anakin Skywalker and Padmé Amidala/Legends|wedding]] to the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Darred became connected to the [[Skywalker family/Legends|Skywalker family]], which would become the most famous family in [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] history.<ref name="FF140" />

==Behind the scenes==
The character of Darred was first mentioned in the [[Databank (original)|Databank]] entries for Pooja and Sola Naberrie, which were published on [[StarWars.com]] in [[2002]]. Pooja's entry used the name "Darred Naberrie,"<ref name="Pooja" /> while Sola's entry used "Darred Janren" and specified that they both agreed to keep the Naberrie surname after their marriage.<ref name="Sola" /> The character was fully identified as "Darred Janren Naberrie" in ''[[Star Wars Annual 2009]]'', a reference book published in [[2008]].<ref name="Annual" />

The [[The Official Star Wars Fact File 80|eightieth issue]] of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'' magazine, published by [[De Agostini]]<ref name="FF80" /> around [[July 9]], [[2003]]<ref name="FFDate">{{FFdates|80}}</ref> and written by [[Iain Lowson]]<ref name="FF Author">{{LinkedIn|url=in/iainlowson|text=Iain Lowson|archivefile=File:IainLowson-LinkedIn.png}}</ref> stated that Sola and Darred's wedding took place roughly halfway through Padmé Amidala's [[Time/Legends|time]] as queen of Naboo,<ref name="FF80" /> placing it around 28 BBY.<ref name="Date" /> Meanwhile, [[2009]]'s ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' stated that their wedding was held shortly after the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]],<ref name="CSWE" /> which occurred in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> This article follows the Fact File's timeline.
